name: Boston Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter; gradually add sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt; add to creamed mixture alternately with milk, beginning and ending with flour mixture. Mix after each addition.
4. Stir in vanilla.
5. Pour batter into 2 greased and floured 9-inch round cake pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool in pans 10 minutes; remove from pans, and let cool completely on wire racks.
7. Spread cream filling between cake layers.
8. Spread chocolate glaze over top of cake, letting excess drip down sides of cake.
9. Chill until ready to serve.
Cream Filling Yield: 2 1/2 cups
Chocolate Glaze Yield: 1/2 cup
